case_title: LEONG, ALBERT vs. UYEHARA, LLOYD T. et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - COMMERCIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEONG, ALBERT AS TO DEFENDANT UYEHARA, LLOYD T. DOES 1-10 SUMMONS ISSUED
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FIELD

MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEONG, ALBERT COURT TRIAL SET FOR AUG-16-1999 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 514 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
TRIAL ASSIGNED TO DEPARTMENT 514

COURT TRIAL: HON. CARLOS T. BEA; CLERK: DAN MACDUFF; REPORTER: KERRY GILLETT. PLTF CSL JEFFREY T. TSU; DEFT IN PRO PER. PARTIES SWORN AND EXAMINED. EVIDENCE INTRODUCED. PLTF CSL TESTIFIES AS TO ATTY FEES. MATTER STANDS SUBMITTED.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAKE NOTHING FROM DEFENDANT UYEHARA, LLOYD T. UPON REPAIRS BEING MADE, TENANT SHALL BE LIABLE FOR UNPAID RENTS, WITHOUT INTEREST, FR. 5/1/99 TO DATE OF REPAIRS, LESS $250.00 PER MONTH COMMENCING 1/1/96 TO DATE OF REPAIRS. COSTS AWARDED TO DEFENDANT.

REMITTITUR FILED THE COURT DETERMINES THAT APPELLANT'S CONTENTIONS FAIL TO DEMONSTRATE PREJUDICIAL ERROR. THEREFORE IT IS ORDERED BY THE COURT THAT THE JUDGMENT ENTERED IN THE LIMITED JURISDIC- TION IS HEREBY AFFIRMED. PURSUANT TO SECTION 1034 OF THE C C P & C R C, 135A, B & C, COSTS ARE HEREBY AWARDED THE PREVAILING PARTY.
